creator: amendlik@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #55)

I believe your suggestion #2 is exactly the configuration I tested. In comment #51, you said:

    can you please install ports/security/openssh-portable@gssapi or pkg install openssh-portable-gssapi. This uses MIT KRB5 instead of Heimdal and will either substantiate or disprove my hypothesis.

openssh-portable-gssapi is built against security/krb5 and that is what I tested. Does that change your interpretation of the logs?
